titleStmt.title: SII 39.105: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 105. (A.R. No. 105 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (OUTSIDE) [JA]ṬĀVA[RMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVANACHAKRAVAR]TIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA.

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription refers to an assurance given to the temple authorities by the nāṭṭār of Poṉṉamarāvati nāḍu, for meeting the cost of offerings made to the service called Poṉṉamarāvati-nāḍaṉ-sandi instituted in the temple from the tax called Viniyōgam, Tappivēlāṉ, Nilamaiyaḻagiyavēlaṉ, Takkavēlāṇ, etc., Pirakaḍakaṇavēḷaṉ Adhiyamāṉ are figured as signatories of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[śrī] maṟkittikku ṭaipanma tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu
tikai ø nāḷ poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉ ṉāyanā
yil tāṉattāṟku piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu yiṉṉāyanāṟku Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭava tirunāmattu
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka muṉṉāḷulakuṭaiya perumāḷ prasātañceytaruḷat tirumukappaṭi Iṟai kaḻi
koḷakkuṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟukku nāṭṭil niṟa pil kaḻittu tirunāmattukkāṇi tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
yāy potukiṟa Ippaṟṟile Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭu viniyokamāna nilam k koḷḷa potukaiyil Iṟai kaḻittup
paṭikku viṉiyokam yiraṇṭum Ulakuṭaiyapperumāḷ prasādañ ceytaruḷiya tirumukam ko
ṭṭuk kuṭukkaiyil yiṉṉāḷ mutal Ittirukkoḷakkuṭi kkum tirunāma
ttukkāṇi tevatāṉap paṟṟukkum nāṅkaḷ koṇṭu ponta viṉiyokam kaḻittu Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭukku naṉṟā
ka Iṉṉāyanāṟku tiruppaḷḷi Eḻicciyil Amutu ceytaruḷak kaṭṭina poṉṉamarāpati nāṭaṉ cantikku nāḷ
Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭi Arici patakkum paṭi viñcaṉamuḷḷuṭṭa cilavukku Ippaṟṟil viniyokamāvuḷḷa mutal taṇ
ṭikkoṇṭu poṉṉamarāpati nāṭaṉ canti Amuta ceytaruḷap paṇṇuvatāka viṉiyokam kaḻittu Ippa
ṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷa piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār
koḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya ṉāyanār tirukkoyil tāṉattāṟku poṉṉamarāpati nāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom Ippaṭi nā
ṭṭār colpaṭi tappi veḷaāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nilamaiyaḻakiya veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku mana takka
ṇa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pirakaṭa kaṇaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cūriyāṇ
ṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi valla ṭeḻutiṉeṉatiyamāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
